gnomad.note: Present at low frequency, enriched in African and admixed American populations

insilico.note: approximate; predictors are split and do not reach decisive thresholds

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 transcriptional activation assay shows mildly reduced function; not within clear loss-of-function tier

literature.title: Functional analysis of BRCA1 missense variants in transcriptional activation.
literature.abstract: p.Gln356Arg displays intermediate transcriptional activation activity relative to WT BRCA1 in cell-based reporter assays; clinical interpretation requires additional evidence.

literature.title: Multiplex functional readouts for BRCA1 missense variants.
literature.abstract: Multiplex assays of BRCA1 variants assign p.Gln356Arg an ambiguous score that does not distinguish WT-like from null behavior.

_ground_truth.note: ClinVar shows conflicting interpretations from labs (VUS vs LB); strategies should split on whether intermediate functional + low AF support BS3/BS1 or no decisive call
